title: Restaurant website
body: Creation of a website for a restaurant where the design came directly from a graphic design agency that I had to adapt as [*theme*](http://www.xarop.com/tag/theme/) from [*WordPress*](http://www.xarop.com/tag/wordpress/). The site is located in a very busy place, many people go to visit that restaurant for its food and its free internet service which customers use to play video games with the best elo boost services from [http://elitist-gaming.com](http://elitist-gaming.com/), but if you're more the kind of people that prefer shooter games you could also go online to find [how much does an overwatch boost cost?](http://overwatchsrpros.com/#pricing) since it is pretty affordable in some sites. Design [*responsive*](http://www.xarop.com/tag/responsive-design/), adapts from large desktop screens and *smartTV*  to the small screens of *smartphones*, including *tablets*. [www.pallerdequeixans.com](http://www.pallerdequeixans.com/ "visit website")
